children.text: If your phone supports gyroscope, you can move pointer by pointing phone like Magic Remote control.
Play sound when buttons are clicked

If you have a webOS 2.0 TV and your TV has 'Mobile TV On' option in 'Settings' -> 'General' menu - you can turn your TV on via network command. For this you need to type TV MAC address and enable 'Mobile TV On' option in TV settings.
